name: news-app-fullstack
description: Fullstack news application — Next.js 15 + Express + Prisma + Postgres

scripts.dev: concurrently -n be,fe -c yellow,cyan "npm run dev:be" "npm run dev:fe"
scripts.build: npm --prefix backend run build && npm --prefix frontend run build
scripts.start: concurrently -n be,fe -c yellow,cyan "npm --prefix backend start" "npm --prefix frontend start"
